actionUnits.condition: Trigger the XR Interaction Toolkit Interactable event SelectEntered on MonoBehaviour id 863850741 (guid 8a35f6cfbfba9b548aaa00d52cfe8a50) attached to Play/Pause (fileID 863850739). This object has a BoxCollider (id 863850742) and no Rigidbody, so we use Trigger action. The SelectEntered event has one Persistent Call to PlaySoundsFromList.PlayPause() on component fileID 1734837741. This simulates selecting the Play/Pause control to toggle audio playback.
